address.Address: E-6/A, E Block, Sector 50, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201303

school_address.streetAddress: E-6/A, E Block, Sector 50, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201303

reviews.author: Aditi Ghoshal
reviews.review_body: We are very fortunate & grateful to Windows & all the teachers for taking care of my baby in her life's first schooling journey. Our sincere gratitude to the teachers for contributing to our child's growth & curiosity for learning... Thank you for being so kind & putting all the hard work, patience, dedication for shaping our child's future. Being a COVID era kid the teachers really helped in transforming her social skills. My child was very comfortable & happy at school. Also, we want to express our appreciation for all the love, care & support you had shown to our child. Thank you so much!!

reviews.author: Soni Sharma
reviews.review_body: Best play and pre-nursery school in Noida. Lower teacher-child ratio gets the child required attention and care, qualified teachers and staff, good facilities, plenty of activities for the child and most of all they provide a safe environment for child to learn and grow.

reviews.author: Shonali Kapoor - Chaturvedi
reviews.review_body: A rare gem! By far the best in Noida, hands down! Sonya, Mrs. Baluja and the team of teachers are nurturing and put so much thought into the kids days, activities and their emotional being. The perfect place to start young kids for a strong foundation. As a parent, there’s plenty I’ve learned from them and continue to do so. Thank you Windows for all you do. More power to you!

reviews.author: Keshav Arora
reviews.review_body: My daughter goes to windows and we love the ethos of the school. No helicopter parenting, letting the children learn at their own pace and not rushing them to mug up thing.

reviews.author: Rachna Rana
reviews.review_body: My kids have gone to Windows Play school....It has been a wonderful experience....All the staffs right from the Principal to the Didi's are very caring and doing a fabulous job. Its a very balanced place, not only about the academic or fun activities...they instill some basic values in the children too.

reviews.author: Subah Bathla
reviews.review_body: Always heard that this is the best playschool in Noida. And thankfully we waited till they reopened after covid. It's a perfect blend of warmth and wisdom which is easily evident by seeing the teachers only. Mrs baluja is an experienced lady and I just love how she understands the need of every child alongwith their parents. All the teachers are very supportive and helpful. They prepare the children very well for the interviews. Also it was very thoughtful of them to conduct an orientation for parents regarding the admission process. Overall, It was a very nice experience. Just trust in the Windows Team for they know what they are making child to be - a happy and thoughtful human being !! 😊

reviews.author: Nandita Bajaj
reviews.review_body: Talking about year 2000 when my son joined this school.Beautiful memories of Monica Ma’am

reviews.author: Mansi srivastava
reviews.review_body: Seen a huge difference in my daughter's attitude after she started going to windows. Wish there was not this kind of abrupt end of the session due to Corona. She wishes to meet her teachers and as a parent I would strongly request the online sessions to continue so that children still feel that they are a part of the windows school. To be frank my daughter misses her school, teachers and friends a lot. And we too. 😊

reviews.author: DivyaPawan Bedi
reviews.review_body:
Windows School is one of the best play school in Noida. It not only focuses on the child care and development but shapes the child personality in such a beautiful manner that it leaves an everlasting impact on both child and the parents mind.
Proud to have my daughter studied in that school.
Special thanks to Ms. Baluja, Zarine Ma'am, Sweety Aunty and Aditi Aunty.

reviews.author: Shweta Khemani
reviews.review_body: One of the finest school is 'Windows' for any child just like second home!
